channel.title: Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Soyoung Choi on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Designing a Clinical Ethics Education Program for Nurses Based on the ADDIE model

item.description: Poster Presentation; September 15-18, 2018; Gaylord Opryland Hotel & Convention Center; Nashville Tennessee

item.title: Current Pharmacogenetic Approach for Oxaliplatin-induced Peripheral Neuropathy among Patients with Colorectal Cancer: A Systematic Review
Software Development (JooYoung Seo & Soyoung Choi)
item.description:
Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018a). Ezpickr: Import various data file types as a rectangular form using a file picker dialogue box. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ezpickr

Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018b). Mboxr: Converting an mbox file into a tibble. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mboxr

item.title: The Influence of Self-care Agency and Social Support as Factors Influencing Self-care Practice in Spinal Cord Injured Patients
34th CSUN Assistive Technology Conference
item.description: The biggest assistive technology conference all over the world.

item.title: ENRS 31st Annual Scientific Sessions
item.description: Soyoung’s “Heart Failure Research Using Text Mining: A Systematic Review” study will be presented on Thursday Afternoon, April 4, 2018 from 3:30 pm-4:30 pm.

item.title: Nursing Theory: A 50 Year Perspective, Past and Future
item.description: Soyoung’s concept analysis of caregiver burden in palliative care was presented in Nursing Theory Conference (Thursday, March 21 & Friday, March 22, 2019).
